$comment: Hospitality Commons node template — clone this to stand up your own port. Same structure, local soul. Reno is the flagship; swap in your wildlife, heritage, and terrain. Voice tiers: mythic | operational | verified.

contact.protocol: old-school — one person answers, no funnel

citadel.$comment: The amusement-park downtown — life concentrated in one walkable re-lit core; surrounding country untouched.
citadel.core: DESCRIBE_YOUR_DOWNTOWN_CORE (e.g. two re-lit blocks, saloon hall, rooms above)

trackA.$comment: Pristine Commons — un-motorized, heritage-grade. List what is native and legal in your region.

trackB.$comment: Overcharge Park — motorized thunder on barren ground only, fully disconnected from sensitive water and wildlife. Optional; omit if your node runs quiet-only.
adventures: YOUR_KINETIC_GROUND (e.g. dry lake beds, winter bowls)

rail.$comment: The invisible concierge layer — the machine carries 100% of logistics.

stations.title: Downtown Citadel Host
stations.claim: building owners, civic developers, co-op organizers

stations.title: Master Outfitter & Guide Commander
stations.claim: licensed outfitters, hunters, anglers, wranglers, kinetic marshals

stations.title: First Travelers
stations.claim: anyone — tell the desk your window

economics.$comment: Honor-system reciprocity — live balance both parties can see and adjust; no corporate skim. Same system as the parent music catalog honor pass.
economics.costIn: low by design — under-utilized assets only: empty floors, idle gear and stock, off-season skill
economics.commitment: season by season, extend by mutual yes
